description_long: This SUV features a robust, boxy design with a two-tone color scheme of orange and black, giving it a rugged and adventurous appearance. The vehicle has a high ground clearance, prominent wheel arches, and black cladding along the lower body and bumpers, suggesting off-road capability. The front end is equipped with a bold grille and a set of round headlights, while the rear includes a spare tire mounted on the back door, typical of utility vehicles. The windows are tinted dark, and the roof is fitted with rails for additional cargo or equipment. The wheels are large with visible orange-accented rims, enhancing the sporty look. The overall build and details indicate a modern SUV designed for both urban and off-road environments.
description: A rugged orange and black SUV with high ground clearance, bold grille, and sporty orange-accented wheels, designed for both city and off-road use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold grille, round headlights, and orange bumper details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-tone body, large windows, and orange-accented wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire mounted on the back door and black bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the SUV's boxy shape and roof rails.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke rims with orange accents and a solid, sporty appearance
